Bash(cd D:/Portafolio/LevelUp-ELO && python -c "
from src.infrastructure.persistence.sqlite_repository import SQLiteRepository
repo = SQLiteRepository\(\)
print\(f'DB path: {repo.db_name}'\)

import os
print\(f'File exists: {os.path.exists\(repo.db_name\)}'\)
print\(f'File size: {os.path.getsize\(repo.db_name\)} bytes'\)

conn = repo.get_connection\(\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users WHERE is_test_user = 1'\)
print\(f'Test students: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_test_user = 1'\)
print\(f'Enrollments: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
conn.close\(\)
")
